steps.title: Attach the comparison
steps.content: The opening phrase unlike most paintings must be followed by the painting being compared with most paintings in the florilegium. The subject after the comma should be Chiliza's vignette.

steps.title: Avoid a dangling modifier
steps.content: A makes Chiliza the subject, B makes contextualization the subject, and C makes a plant's ecosystem the subject, so each creates an illogical comparison. The answer is D.
